---
title: "huimori_4_analysis_ERA5"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: show
    code-summary: "코드 보기"
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: paged
    page-layout: full
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(devtools)
install.packages(".")

library(targets)
targets::tar_validate()
targets::tar_destroy()
targets::tar_make()
targets::tar_visnetwork()
```

# 1
